author: Sablinova
install_msg: SabbySlashTags installed. Use [p]sabbytags to manage tags and /c to use them.
name: SabbySlashTags
short: Global tag system with TagScript support via /c slash command.
description: A lightweight global tag system using TagScript. Tags are created with [p]sabbytags and invoked with /c as a user-installed slash command.
end_user_data_statement: This cog stores user IDs for tag authorship and whitelist purposes.
